requirement: Market/Segment hierarchy, circuit breakers, self-trade prevention, mass cancel

tasks.title: Market/Segment hierarchy + circuit breakers types + stores
tasks.description:
Add Market/Segment hierarchy and circuit breaker types to the securities-service.

Read src/securities-service/internal/types/types.go for existing types.
Read src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go for store patterns.
Read docs/millenniumit-gap-analysis.md for requirements context.

Part A — Market/Segment types (add to types.go):
- Market struct: ID, Name, Status (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED/CLOSED), Timezone, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags
- Segment struct: ID, MarketID, Name, Status (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED), CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags
- Update Instrument to add SegmentID string field (optional, empty = unassigned)

Part B — Circuit breaker types:
- CircuitBreaker struct: InstrumentID, StaticUpperPct float64, StaticLowerPct float64, DynamicUpperPct float64, DynamicLowerPct float64, ReferencePrice float64, LastTradedPrice float64, Status (ACTIVE/TRIGGERED/COOLDOWN), CooldownMinutes int, TriggeredAt string — json tags
- CircuitBreakerEvent struct: InstrumentID, Type (STATIC_UPPER/STATIC_LOWER/DYNAMIC_UPPER/DYNAMIC_LOWER), TriggerPrice float64, ReferencePrice float64, Timestamp — json tags

Part C — Self-trade prevention types:
- STPMode: STP_CANCEL_NEWEST, STP_CANCEL_OLDEST, STP_CANCEL_BOTH
- Add STPMode field to Instrument struct (default STP_CANCEL_NEWEST)

Part D — Stores (add to store.go):
- MarketStore interface: Create, Get, List, Update, UpdateStatus
- SegmentStore interface: Create, Get, List(marketID), Update
- CircuitBreakerStore interface: Get(instrumentID), Set, List, UpdateStatus
- InMemoryMarketStore, InMemorySegmentStore, InMemoryCircuitBreakerStore
- Seed: one default market 'MSE' (ACTIVE, Asia/Ulaanbaatar), one segment 'EQUITY' (market: MSE)

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Circuit breaker engine + self-trade prevention in matching
tasks.description:
Implement circuit breaker price validation and self-trade prevention in the matching engine.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md for types.
Read src/securities-service/internal/engine/engine.go for MatchOrder logic.

Part A — Circuit breaker validation (new file: src/securities-service/internal/engine/circuit_breaker.go):
- CircuitBreakerEngine struct with circuitBreakerStore
- ValidatePrice(instrumentID string, price float64) (bool, *CircuitBreakerEvent, error):
  1. Get circuit breaker config for instrument
  2. If no config, allow (no breaker set)
  3. Check static bands: if price > referencePrice * (1 + staticUpperPct/100) → STATIC_UPPER breach
  4. Check static bands: if price < referencePrice * (1 - staticLowerPct/100) → STATIC_LOWER breach
  5. Check dynamic bands: same logic against lastTradedPrice with dynamicPcts
  6. If breach: return false + CircuitBreakerEvent
  7. If no breach: return true
- OnTrade(instrumentID string, price float64) — update lastTradedPrice in circuit breaker store

Part B — Wire into MatchOrder (engine.go):
- Before matching: validate incoming order price against circuit breaker
- If breaker triggered: reject order with 422 'circuit breaker triggered', auto-halt instrument
- After each trade: call OnTrade to update lastTradedPrice

Part C — Self-trade prevention (add to engine.go MatchOrder):
- Before creating a trade, check if buyer participant_id == seller participant_id
- Get STP mode from instrument
- STP_CANCEL_NEWEST: cancel the incoming order, keep resting
- STP_CANCEL_OLDEST: cancel the resting order, keep incoming
- STP_CANCEL_BOTH: cancel both
- Log STP event, continue matching with next resting order

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: HTTP handlers — markets, segments, circuit breakers, mass cancel
tasks.description:
Add HTTP endpoints for markets, segments, circuit breakers, and mass cancel.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md and T2.md for types and engine.
Read src/securities-service/internal/server/server.go for route registration.

Part A — Market/Segment handlers (new: src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_market.go):
- GET /api/v1/securities/markets — list markets
- POST /api/v1/securities/markets — create market
- GET /api/v1/securities/markets/{id} — get market
- PUT /api/v1/securities/markets/{id}/status — update status
- GET /api/v1/securities/segments — list segments (optional ?market_id= filter)
- POST /api/v1/securities/segments — create segment

Part B — Circuit breaker handlers (new: src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_circuit_breaker.go):
- GET /api/v1/securities/circuit-breakers — list all circuit breaker configs
- GET /api/v1/securities/circuit-breakers/{instrument_id} — get for instrument
- PUT /api/v1/securities/circuit-breakers/{instrument_id} — set/update config (static_upper_pct, static_lower_pct, dynamic_upper_pct, dynamic_lower_pct, reference_price, cooldown_minutes)
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/circuit-breakers/{instrument_id} — remove config

Part C — Mass cancel handler (add to handlers_order.go):
- POST /api/v1/securities/orders/mass-cancel — body: {instrument_id?, participant_id?, side?}
  1. List all PENDING orders matching filters
  2. Cancel each one
  3. Return {cancelled_count: N, orders: [...]}

Part D — Wire all routes in server.go + update main.go with new stores.

Part E — Add gateway reverse proxy routes in src/gateway/cmd/gateway/main.go for:
- /api/v1/securities/markets, /markets/{id}, /markets/{id}/status
- /api/v1/securities/segments
- /api/v1/securities/circuit-breakers, /circuit-breakers/{id}
- /api/v1/securities/orders/mass-cancel

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for all P1a features
tasks.description:
Write unit tests for market hierarchy, circuit breakers, STP, and mass cancel.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md, T2.md, T3.md.

Tests:

1. src/securities-service/internal/engine/circuit_breaker_test.go:
- TestCircuitBreaker_PriceWithinBands — allow
- TestCircuitBreaker_StaticUpperBreach — reject
- TestCircuitBreaker_StaticLowerBreach — reject
- TestCircuitBreaker_DynamicBreach — reject based on last traded price
- TestCircuitBreaker_NoBreakerSet — allow (no config)
- TestCircuitBreaker_OnTrade — lastTradedPrice updated

2. engine_test.go additions:
- TestSTP_CancelNewest — same participant, incoming cancelled
- TestSTP_CancelOldest — same participant, resting cancelled
- TestSTP_CancelBoth — both cancelled
- TestSTP_DifferentParticipants — no STP, trade executes

3. store_test.go additions:
- TestMarketStore_CRUD
- TestSegmentStore_CRUD
- TestCircuitBreakerStore_SetGet

4. handlers_market_test.go:
- TestCreateMarket, TestListMarkets
- TestCreateSegment, TestListSegments

5. handlers_circuit_breaker_test.go:
- TestSetCircuitBreaker, TestGetCircuitBreaker

Target: 70%+ on new code.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T4.md
